tutorial.title: How to make an agent
tutorial.subtitle: Create, run, improve, and verify an Account Health Agent.
tutorial.outroTitle: Agent shared from the hosted Profile
tutorial.outroSubtitle: Available to teammates and hosted sandboxes. · Synthetic tutorial data · AI-generated narration

narration.instructions: Warm, clear product tutorial narration. Speak at a calm conversational pace with practical emphasis on user choices, evidence, approvals, and results. Pronounce OpenPond as open pond, P1 as P one, CSV as C S V, JSON as jay son, and Taskset as task set. Finish each sentence cleanly. Avoid hype, sales cadence, dramatic delivery, or imitation of any real person.

chapters.label: Create
chapters.title: Create an Agent
chapters.subtitle: Turn a plain-language purpose into a working Account Health Agent.
chapters.outroSubtitle: The agent is ready to use. · AI-generated narration

chapters.label: Use
chapters.title: Use the Agent
chapters.subtitle: Chat with the Account Health Agent and run its actions with approval.
chapters.outroSubtitle: The result and supporting evidence are ready to review. · AI-generated narration

chapters.label: Improve
chapters.title: Improve the Agent
chapters.subtitle: Use real run evidence and Evals to make the Account Health Agent better.
chapters.outroSubtitle: The updated agent passed its Evals. · AI-generated narration

frames.label: Start in Lab
frames.caption: Open Lab, choose Agent, and start the guided creation flow.
frames.narration: Open Lab, choose Agent, and start the guided creation flow.

frames.label: Start from a prompt or chats
frames.caption: Choose From prompt to describe the Agent directly, or From chats to include examples of the work it should handle.
frames.narration: Choose From prompt to describe the Agent directly, or From chats to include examples of the work it should handle.

frames.label: Add purpose and chats
frames.caption: This synthetic example starts with three chats: Acme has renewal blockers, Northstar is expanding, and the team needs a weekly account review. Add them with the Agent purpose.
frames.narration: This synthetic example starts with three chats: Acme has renewal blockers, Northstar is expanding, and the team needs a weekly account review. Add them with the Agent purpose.

frames.label: See how chats build the plan
frames.caption: Review the selected excerpts as examples. OpenPond turns their recurring goals, decisions, corrections, and answer patterns into the first Agent plan.
frames.narration: Review the selected excerpts as examples. OpenPond turns their recurring goals, decisions, corrections, and answer patterns into the first Agent plan.

frames.label: Review the Agent
frames.caption: The draft converts those examples into the Agent's purpose, chat behavior, runnable actions, output formats, and Evals for your review.
frames.narration: The draft converts those examples into the Agent's purpose, chat behavior, runnable actions, output formats, and Evals for your review.

frames.label: Answer the planning question
frames.caption: The right side panel asks how the Agent should prioritize conflicting account risks.
frames.narration: The right side panel asks how the Agent should prioritize conflicting account risks.

frames.label: Confirm the plan
frames.caption: Before creation, review the proposed name, chat endpoint, runnable actions, Evals, and output formats.
frames.narration: Before creation, review the proposed name, chat endpoint, runnable actions, Evals, and output formats.

frames.label: Edit the plan
frames.caption: If the plan misses a requirement, open Edit plan and describe the change in plain language before any Agent source is created.
frames.narration: If the plan misses a requirement, open Edit plan and describe the change in plain language before any Agent source is created.

frames.label: Create from the revised plan
frames.caption: Review the revised plan, then click Confirm plan to create the Agent and run its Evals.
frames.narration: Review the revised plan, then click Confirm plan to create the Agent and run its Evals.

frames.label: Review the Evals
frames.caption: This is the creation result: OpenPond built the Agent and passed its behavior Evals against the Account Health examples.
frames.narration: This is the creation result: OpenPond built the Agent and passed its behavior Evals against the Account Health examples.

frames.label: Save the Agent
frames.caption: After the Evals pass, the Agent is saved to your Profile and is ready to use.
frames.narration: After the Evals pass, the Agent is saved to your Profile and is ready to use.

frames.label: Use the Agent
frames.caption: The Agent page shows its purpose, chat entrypoint, and runnable account actions.
frames.narration: The Agent page shows its purpose, chat entrypoint, and runnable account actions.

frames.label: Ask the chat endpoint
frames.caption: Use opens a normal chat with the Agent attached. Type a natural-language question about Acme before sending it.
frames.narration: Use opens a normal chat with the Agent attached. Type a natural-language question about Acme before sending it.

frames.label: Ask about Acme
frames.caption: Acme is the at-risk example: the Agent answers in chat with renewal timing, usage decline, the disputed invoice, and the open P1 case.
frames.narration: Acme is the at-risk example: the Agent answers in chat with renewal timing, usage decline, the disputed invoice, and the open P1 case.

frames.label: Ask a follow-up
frames.caption: A follow-up keeps Acme context and assigns the first actions to Revenue Operations and Support instead of restarting the conversation.
frames.narration: A follow-up keeps Acme context and assigns the first actions to Revenue Operations and Support instead of restarting the conversation.

frames.label: Choose a direct action
frames.caption: The action picker offers chat plus each runnable account action, so you can choose conversation or a focused task.
frames.narration: The action picker offers chat plus each runnable account action, so you can choose conversation or a focused task.

frames.label: Summarize Northstar
frames.caption: Northstar is the healthy expansion example from the source chats. Its direct summary identifies rising usage and the request for twenty-five more seats.
frames.narration: Northstar is the healthy expansion example from the source chats. Its direct summary identifies rising usage and the request for twenty-five more seats.

frames.label: Triage Acme
frames.caption: Running renewal triage for Acme returns high risk, cites the billing and support blockers, and orders the next steps.
frames.narration: Running renewal triage for Acme returns high risk, cites the billing and support blockers, and orders the next steps.

frames.label: Build the weekly review
frames.caption: The weekly review action combines the portfolio and returns visible Markdown, CSV, and JSON artifacts for downstream use.
frames.narration: The weekly review action combines the portfolio and returns visible Markdown, CSV, and JSON artifacts for downstream use.

frames.label: Verify persistence
frames.caption: After restarting OpenPond, the same Agent, chat history, and actions remain available.
frames.narration: After restarting OpenPond, the same Agent, chat history, and actions remain available.

frames.label: Identify the behavior gap
frames.caption: The current Agent finds the right facts, but buries the priority after the account summary. Improve will make the billing and P1 decision lead every high-risk result.
frames.narration: The current Agent finds the right facts, but buries the priority after the account summary. Improve will make the billing and P1 decision lead every high-risk result.

frames.label: Start Improve
frames.caption: Open Improve agent on the existing Agent, then choose whether to describe the correction directly or include a chat that demonstrates it.
frames.narration: Open Improve agent on the existing Agent, then choose whether to describe the correction directly or include a chat that demonstrates it.

frames.label: Add the correction chat
frames.caption: Choose From chats, ask every high-risk response to lead with the billing and P1 decision, and attach the correction conversation that demonstrates it.
frames.narration: Choose From chats, ask every high-risk response to lead with the billing and P1 decision, and attach the correction conversation that demonstrates it.

frames.label: Review the improvement
frames.caption: Review the new lead-with-priority behavior, the existing capabilities that must stay intact, and the Evals OpenPond will rerun.
frames.narration: Review the new lead-with-priority behavior, the existing capabilities that must stay intact, and the Evals OpenPond will rerun.

frames.label: Confirm the Improve plan
frames.caption: Review the planned change and confirm that it preserves citations and every existing action.
frames.narration: Review the planned change and confirm that it preserves citations and every existing action.

frames.label: Compare the results
frames.caption: The same locked Evals make the decision clear: the current Agent misses the new lead sentence, while the updated Agent passes every original and new Eval.
frames.narration: The same locked Evals make the decision clear: the current Agent misses the new lead sentence, while the updated Agent passes every original and new Eval.

frames.label: Save the improvement
frames.caption: Apply the update only after that comparison. The existing Agent updates in place, with the successful Evals recorded.
frames.narration: Apply the update only after that comparison. The existing Agent updates in place, with the successful Evals recorded.

frames.label: Verify improved chat
frames.caption: The improved chat now places disputed billing and the open P1 case ahead of adoption decline while preserving source citations.
frames.narration: The improved chat now places disputed billing and the open P1 case ahead of adoption decline while preserving source citations.

frames.label: Verify improved triage
frames.caption: The direct triage action repeats the billing-first result, proving the change works outside chat without breaking the existing workflow.
frames.narration: The direct triage action repeats the billing-first result, proving the change works outside chat without breaking the existing workflow.

frames.label: Commit the Profile source
frames.caption: Commit the final Agent source with a clear Git message so the exact Profile version remains reviewable and shareable.
frames.narration: Commit the final Agent source with a clear Git message so the exact Profile version remains reviewable and shareable.

frames.label: Review the hosted sync
frames.caption: Open Sync to review the committed Profile changes. Confirm sync publishes this version so teammates can use the Agent in chat and hosted sandboxes can attach the same source.
frames.narration: Open Sync to review the committed Profile changes. Confirm sync publishes this version so teammates can use the Agent in chat and hosted sandboxes can attach the same source.
